indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Use during Indian festivals and ceremonies where elegant serving ware enhances hospitality
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Placed on dining or living room tables during family gatherings, festivals, poojas, and social visits
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Sophisticated and artisanal luxury kitchenware that blends traditional Indian aesthetics with modern home décor

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Marble & Mother of Pearl Bloom Platter - Decorative Serving Tray for Indian Kitchen & Dining, Elegant Flower Inlay Design
bullet_points: Premium Marble & Mother of Pearl Craftsmanship - Adds luxurious charm and durability to your serving ware
Elegant Floral Bloom Design - Hand-inlaid natural shell petals to enhance dining table decor
Ideal for Indian Festivals & Entertaining - Perfect for Diwali, weddings, and family gatherings
Multi-functional Platter - Serve appetizers, sweets, dry fruits or use as a decorative centerpiece
Easy to Clean & Maintain - Polished surface with stain-resistant quality for everyday use
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your dining and entertaining experience with Tatsya’s Marble & Mother of Pearl Bloom Platter. Crafted with exquisite natural materials and a beautiful floral motif, this platter is perfect for serving delicacies or adding an artisanal touch to your Indian festivities and home décor.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Craftsmanship and Material Quality - Close-up visuals showcasing marble texture and mother of pearl inlay
Versatile Serving Ideas - Images showing platter used for Indian sweets, dry fruits, and snacks
Festive Indian Lifestyle - Platter in Diwali, wedding, and family dining settings with traditional décor
Care & Maintenance Tips - Visual instructions emphasizing easy cleaning and durability
Brand Story & Heritage - Introducing Tatsya’s commitment to artisanal and premium kitchenware

Marble platter for Diwali and wedding gifts

Communicate ease of maintenance alongside luxury
Position as a sophisticated gifting option
Incorporate authentic Indian festival use cases

Appeal to urban, affluent Indian buyers seeking luxury kitchenware

Focus on emotional connection of hosting and gifting

Use clear and elegant product visuals
Include lifestyle shots with Indian cultural authenticity

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Design, shape, size, color, and mother of pearl floral inlay must remain exactly as shown; no alterations to detailing or branding.
recommended_image_angles: Lifestyle context with platter in use
recommended_real_life_environments: Modern Indian dining table with subtle décor
Festival occasion setup with minimal props
indian_lifestyle_settings: Sunday brunch or tea time appetizer setup
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Soft, natural daylight simulation with professional diffusion to avoid harsh shadows; maintain warm tones to bring out marble and pearl texture under realistic usage.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimalistic white or light beige backgrounds with subtle shadows and accents to create a premium and airy shopping experience.

suitable_backgrounds: Solid white or cream matte surface
lifestyle_scenarios: Festive sweets and dry fruits served on platter during Diwali
Platter with Indian snacks at family gathering
Morning tea-time setup with platter of biscuits
Wedding gifting scene with elegant wrapping
Minimalist modern dining table in urban Indian home
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Minimal text placement on blank areas of the platter edges or above in lifestyle images; avoid text over floral inlay or marble surface.
what_must_be_avoided: Changes or distortion to product shape/color
Obscuring floral inlay with props or text
Inauthentic or overly staged Indian settings
